mapper.select: SELECT task_id, task_type, target_type, target_id, fields_json, task_status, progress_json, last_error, created_at, updated_at FROM bluenote_counter.counter_rebuild_task WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
mapper.update: UPDATE bluenote_counter.counter_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'RUNNING', updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE bluenote_counter.counter_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'SUCCESS', progress_json = #{progressJson}, last_error = NULL, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
UPDATE bluenote_counter.counter_rebuild_task SET task_status = 'FAILED', progress_json = #{progressJson}, last_error = #{lastError}, updated_at = NOW(3) WHERE task_id = #{taskId}
